trends.summary: Supporters of the bill say citizens, rather than corporations, should have more power in elections.

trends.headline: Trump says Russia and Ukraine have agreed to his request for a 3-day ceasefire
trends.summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and Yuri Ushakov, President Vladimir Putin's foreign affairs adviser, both confirmed the agreement for a three-day ceasefire and an exchange of prisoners.

trends.headline: Journalist found dead in Colombia's conflict zone
trends.summary: Mateo Perez, a 25-year-old Colombian reporter, reportedly went missing on May 5 after being detained by guerrilla members at a roadblock.

trends.headline: Mexico to shorten school year due to World Cup, summer heat
trends.summary: Mexican authorities announced a decision to end the academic year earlier than planned because of the World Cup and a heat wave. But the decision sparked backlash from parents' groups and teachers.

trends.headline: Iran war: US expecting Tehran's response to proposed deal
trends.summary: President Donald Trump said Washington was expecting an answer from Tehran over a proposed deal to set up talks to end the war by Friday night Eastern time. Follow live.

trends.headline: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
trends.summary: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.

trends.headline: Legal limbo puts unelected judge in charge of Rio de Janeiro
trends.summary: The interim governor has dismissed more than 1,700 public employees while Brazil’s Supreme Court weighs how the state should choose its next leader.

trends.summary: Alabama lawmakers see the Supreme Court’s ruling on voting rights as a way out of their yearslong fight against adding a second majority-minority district, as ordered by a federal panel.

trends.headline: Georgia faces competitive primary with top GOP seats up for grabs
trends.summary: Often viewed as a battleground state, Georgia is electing a new governor this year — and the GOP primary is looking like a nail-biter.
